title: Marilyn Manson Speed of Pain
lyrics: And they slit our throats like we were flowers And I'm built as you devour When you want it, it goes away too fast And times you hate it always seem to last And just remember when you think you're free The crack inside your fucking heart is me I wanna outrace the speed of pain for another day And I wanna outrace the speed of pain for another, yeah, one more day I wish I could sleep, but I can't lay on my back Cause there's a knife for every day that I've known you When you want it, it goes away too fast And times you hate it always seem to last And just remember when you think you're free The crack inside your fucking heart is me I wanna outrace the speed of pain for another day And I wanna outrace the speed of pain for another day Lie to me, cry to me, give me power Lie with me, die with me, give to me our world I keep all your secrets wrapped in death I keep all your secrets wrapped in death Lie to me, cry to me, give to me our world Lie with me, die with me, give to me our world I hope that we die, I hope it ends I hope that we die, I hope it ends I hope that we die, I hope it ends I wanna hold your hand, baby, hold my hand Oh, oh, oh, oh, my hand Till we're dead and gone and lost in this thing that we call love I wanna outrace the speed of pain for another day       I keep all your secrets wrapped in death
